title: geodorum recurvum
intro: Geodorum recurvum, also known as the curved geodorum orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia, characterized by its curved, yellowish-green flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Geodorum recurvum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
